text: Within these glass and steel confines, I feel a peculiar mix of curiosity and gentle unease. The fluorescent lights cast a cold clarity, yet the R+D wall hints at warmth: research, innovation, connection. I find myself reflecting on how spaces, designed for purpose and progress, can still foster moments of introspection. The dichotomy between clinical utility and human aspiration lingers in the air, leaving me contemplative amidst the hum of bureaucracy and buried optimism.
